'''Dlarnic grazers''' were herbivores common to the [[Triumvirate (planets)|Triumvirate]] worlds: [[Jiroch-Kalok|Kalok]], [[Jiroch-Saloch]] and [[Jiroch-Reslia]]. They were hunted by the [[Tunroth]] and formed part of their staple diet.
